readings.Aries: You thrive in motion. Today the most important motion is internal. The week ahead rewards preparation you can still do today.
readings.Taurus: The season is changing. Not outside — inside. You feel it already. The energy available today is better used gently.
readings.Gemini: There is a project that needs your whole brain, not the spare capacity you've been giving it. The answer that feels too obvious is probably the actual answer.
readings.Cancer: There is love in your life that is waiting to be acknowledged. Notice it. Something you've been measuring incorrectly just corrected itself.
readings.Leo: The performance you're giving is excellent. There is something you're not saying behind it. Notice what hasn't changed, not just what has.
readings.Virgo: You process experience through refinement. The raw material is already good. Trust it. The window for this is shorter than it looks.
readings.Libra: The person you've been accommodating has more capacity than you've been giving them credit for. Expect more. Small, deliberate, and patient — that's the mode today.
readings.Scorpio: There is power in the situation you've been treating as a wound. Reclaim it. The answer that feels too obvious is probably the actual answer.
readings.Sagittarius: There is a pattern in the places you leave and why. Worth examining before the next departure. The week ahead rewards preparation you can still do today.
readings.Capricorn: Your pragmatism is an asset. There is one area of your life where it is preventing something good. Someone you haven't thought of lately is relevant to this.
readings.Aquarius: Something you're doing for the collective has drifted away from the reason you started. Reconnect with the reason. The answer that feels too obvious is probably the actual answer.
readings.Pisces: Your sensitivity to what is unsaid is acute. Today what is unsaid needs to be said by you. The resistance you feel is pointing at something worth examining.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: You both arrived wanting to lead. The negotiation of who does is where most of the energy goes.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: You're both good at starting things. One of you will have to become better at finishing them.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: You make each other more — more energised, more expansive, occasionally more than either of you can contain.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: You understand each other at a speed that feels like recognition. Familiarity this fast always hides something.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: You see each other clearly enough to hurt each other precisely. That's not a warning. It's just the truth.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: You see each other clearly enough to hurt each other precisely. That's not a warning. It's just the truth.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: You recognised each other immediately. Whether that's good news depends entirely on what you recognised.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: The security you build together is real. Real security sometimes disguises the need for something more.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: The energy is contagious. People feel it from the outside. Make sure you both still feel it from the inside.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: The bond forms quietly and completely. What you've bonded over — desire, or need — is worth knowing.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: The security you build together is real. Real security sometimes disguises the need for something more.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: The depth here is real and a little unnerving to both of you.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
